Name: Time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'Assign a Different Editor'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average waiting time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to the first reviewer response ('SW-Reviewer Agreed' or 'SW-Reviewer Declined')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Ratio of average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' versus average time from 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' to 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to the first 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Time between 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' for cases in the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' Cycle Time (from creation to completion of the reminder activity)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and the end of the case

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-EIC Major Revision' in variants where it eventually occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity SW-EIC Major Revision for cases where activity SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Average time until 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' is performed from 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to the case's final decision ('SW-EIC Reject', 'SW-EIC Major Revision', 'SW-EIC Accept', etc.)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity SW-EIC Reject for cases where activity SW-EIC Reject occurs

Name: Average time it takes 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' to occur after the execution of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time difference: (Time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-Reviewer Agreed') minus (Time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-Reviewer Declined')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to the first 'SW-EIC Major Revision' in variants where it occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity SW-EIC Major Revision for cases where activity SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Minimum time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to a reviewer response ('SW-Reviewer Agreed', 'SW-Reviewer Declined', or 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable')
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity SW-Reviewer Agreed for cases where activity SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Average time between 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and the next 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Average waiting time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to the first subsequent reviewer response ('SW-Reviewer Agreed', 'SW-Reviewer Declined', or 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity SW-Reviewer Agreed for cases where activity SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Minimum time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' in successful review completion variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision for cases where activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurs

Name: Time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' in variants with a major revision cycle
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation for cases where activity Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurs

Name: Average time from 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' to 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Elapsed time between 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and the final 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' in the process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity Manuscript Export Succeeded for cases where activity Manuscript Export Succeeded occurs

Name: Average time until 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' is performed from the case start
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'
